messages.content: Hello, Jawis. Hello, Jawis. Hello, Jais.
Hello, Jawis. Hello, Jawis. Hello, Jais.
I think there's been a mix-up with my name, Sir - it's Jarvis, actually.
Hello, Jarvis.
Hello, Jarvis.
Hello, nice to finally get the name right, Sir. What can I help you with today?
Uh create a file on desktop name semantic test and write hello
Created semantic test in Desktop.
Or put World in it.
Face verification is required before I can run that command.
Oh, look at that!
Let me take a look...
Put World in it.
Face verification is required before I can run that command.
Put World in it.
Deleted.
Face verification is required before I can run that command.
Hello Janice, how are you?
Hello Janice, how are you?
I think there's been a mistake, Sir - my name is Jarvis, not Janice.
Oh, we have to make sure that we have to be.
Oh, we have to make sure that we have to be.
I'm not quite following, Sir - could you rephrase that or tell me what's on your mind?
This was not my doing, I just said Hello Jarvis, how are you?
This was not my doing, I just said Hello Jarvis, how are you?
You're right, you did say hello and asked how I was, Sir - I'm doing well, thanks for asking.
